Interest on savings Find the interest rate your local bank pays on savings accounts. ⓐ What is the interest rate? ⓑ Calculate the amount of interest you would earn on a principal of $$\text{$8,000}$$ for $$5$$ years.

Interest on a loan Find the interest rate your local bank charges for a car loan. ⓐ What is the interest rate? ⓑ Calculate the amount of interest you would pay on a loan of $$\text{$8,000}$$ for $$5$$ years.
Why do banks pay interest on money deposited in savings accounts?
Why do banks charge interest for lending money?
